name: United States Antimony Corporation
description: United States Antimony Corporation (USAC) is a diversified natural resource company that produces and sells antimony, gold, silver, and zeolite products. Founded in 1969, the company operates an antimony smelter and refinery in Montana, as well as antimony mines and processing facilities in Mexico. USAC is the only significant producer of antimony in the United States, providing essential materials for flame retardants, lead-acid batteries, and various industrial applications. Additionally, the company mines and processes zeolite in Idaho for use in water filtration, agriculture, and environmental remediation.
